scripts.deploy: pnpm build:snippet && wrangler deploy && wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote
scripts.field: pnpm build:snippet && rm -rf .wrangler/state && wrangler d1 migrations apply proof --local && playwright test -c playwright.field.config.ts
scripts.test:a11y: pnpm build:snippet && wrangler d1 migrations apply proof --local && playwright test -c playwright.config.ts
scripts.screenshot: pnpm build:snippet && rm -rf .wrangler/state && wrangler d1 migrations apply proof --local && playwright test -c playwright.screenshot.config.ts
